notes: L27 Orientation (act 158) 'No Pattern Labels: Recognize, Articulate, Implement Under Pressure', 597.2s, 10 cues. Meta recognition lesson: signal->technique map + 5-step read, then 3 unlabeled worked examples named to their shape. Reuses arrays.py (value_row/window_bracket/code_line/complexity) + bayes.chip; NOT transformer scenes. MathTex only for the Task Scheduler idle formula (f-1)(n+1)+c_max [worked (3-1)(2+1)+1=7] and the palindrome recurrence/dp. Examples verified: MinWindow s=ADOBECODEBANC t=ABC answer=BANC; Palindrome dp for aab (dp[0][1]=T aa, dp[1][2]=F ab, dp[0][2]=F aab, diagonal T). READ start/mid/end each cue (tail cue09 no _end boundary frame — expected). Staged reveals build progressively (map row-by-row, 5 steps, dp diagonal->pair->full). All legible, in-frame (safe-area guard passed), on-brand. 1 -ql iteration, no defects.
